meta.title: Panel 2: Power Shifts in the Eastern Mediterranean:
meta.description:
11:35 am - 12:45 pm
Panel 2: "The Implications of the Strategic Relationship between Israel, Greece, and Cyprus and Turkey's drift towards both authoritarianism and Islamism"
Moderator: Seth Cropsey 
Panelists:
Douglas Feith 
Hillel Fradkin 
David Wurmser 
Joshua Walker
Alexandros Petersen 
 - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
